Explore
Featured

The Queen of Aetheron

Sci-Fi Romance · Enemies to Lovers
Enemies by birth. Allies by deception. Lovers by fate.

When a fierce resistance leader is captured by the ruthless heir to the empire she's vowed to destroy, the last thing Raven of Aetheron expects is to need Adrian Solarius alive. In a dying galaxy where passion is as dangerous as the secrets they keep, deception turns to uneasy alliance, and desire gives way to something far more dangerous. He was raised to conquer. She was born to resist. Together, they may be the only hope either world has left.

Coming Soon →
Latest Release

Amnestic

Dystopian Romance
"In war, the truth is the first casualty."

A story of survival and memory in a world that strips both away. When everything you know is erased, what remains? A dystopian romance that asks how far love can reach through the wreckage of identity — and whether what we forget can still save us.

About the Author

Milena Nikolova

Milena Nikolova is a writer of science fiction and post-apocalyptic fiction, blending action, suspense, and emotion to explore what it means to be human in worlds pushed to the brink.

Her work combines gritty survival with imaginative "what ifs," creating stories that balance high stakes with deeply personal journeys — where the end of the world is never just about the world ending, but about what people become when everything they relied on disappears.

Originally from Bulgaria, Milena writes in English as her second language. She is a self-published author through MGNik Publishing, maintaining full creative control over every aspect of her work.

When not writing, Milena is often reading history and science, exploring the outdoors for inspiration, or sketching out future worlds where humanity is tested in extraordinary ways.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: April 2026

MGNik Publishing ("we," "us," or "our") operates the website mgnikpublishing.com and associated communications. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

Information We Collect
We may collect your name, email address, and phone number when you voluntarily contact us or opt in to receive communications from us.

SMS / Mobile Messaging
If you provide your phone number to receive SMS communications from MGNik Publishing, the following terms apply:

We do not share, sell, rent, or disclose SMS/mobile opt-in data, phone numbers, or message content to third parties for marketing or promotional purposes. No mobile information will be shared with third parties or affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes.

No mobile information — including phone numbers, SMS opt-in data, and message content — will be sold, shared, rented, or disclosed to any third party or affiliate for marketing or any other purpose. This data is collected solely to facilitate direct communications between MGNik Publishing and you. Sharing of personal information with third parties for marketing purposes does not occur.

Message frequency may vary. Message and data rates may apply. You may opt out at any time by replying STOP to any message. For help, reply HELP or contact us at dahlia@mgnikpublishing.com.

How We Use Your Information
Information you provide is used only to respond to your inquiries, send requested communications, and fulfill our obligations to you. We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to outside parties.

Data Security
We implement reasonable measures to protect your information. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, but we take the protection of your data seriously.

Contact
For privacy-related questions, contact us at dahlia@mgnikpublishing.com.
